text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru, the Umamusume<n>blessed
with divine luck, performs<n>well in her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Intending to let the fates decide her<n>next goal, she
asks me to draw a<n>fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it<n>seems our
next race is the Yayoi Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has<n>begun!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it<n>seems our
next race is the Spring<n>Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has<n>begun!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following the will of the fortune slip, it<n>seems our
next race is the Mainichi<n>Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The first hurdle of spring is here!
Matikanefukukitaru's battle has<n>begun!
